name: Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual preparation causes cash flow gaps. We automate the generation of monthly financial statements instead of manual preparation.
problem_solved: Timely generation of financial statements for accounting purposes
